title: encoding_robustness
description: Diagnostic block from 05_four_encoding_diagnostic.R. For each candidate with composite/uncertain structure, the dosage matrix is re-encoded four ways (minor, major, 012, STEP29-polarized), a hclust(ward.D2) cutree(k=3) clustering is computed under each, and pairwise Adjusted Rand Index is reported. Interpretation: min_ari >= 0.9 = structure is robust to encoding choice; min_ari in [0.5, 0.9] = one encoding disagrees (inspect); min_ari < 0.5 = candidate is ambiguous / composite. Does NOT enter the consensus merge; it's a robustness check for composite candidates only.
question: Q2

status.description: ok = 4x4 ARI matrix computed; other values indicate a skip reason.

ari_matrix.description: 4x4 symmetric matrix keyed by encoding pair. Example: { 'minor_vs_major': 1.0, 'minor_vs_012': 0.98, 'minor_vs_polarized': 0.94, 'major_vs_012': 0.98, 'major_vs_polarized': 0.94, '012_vs_polarized': 0.95 }.

min_ari.description: Minimum pairwise ARI across all encoding pairs.

clusters_disagreeing.description: Encoding pair(s) with ARI below the robust threshold, if any.
